title: Bug Report: Segmentation Fault in PyCDE When Instantiating a Struct with Constant Values

features.name: struct instantiation with constant bit field values
features.description: Code should include a struct type instantiation where struct fields are initialized with constant literal values instead of signal references
features.snippet:
struct ExStruct { logic [3:0] a; logic [31:0] b; };
ExStruct s = ExStruct '{ a: 4'b0, b: 32'b0 };

features.name: struct type with mixed width bit fields
features.description: Code should include a struct type definition with multiple fields having different bit widths
features.snippet: struct ExStruct { logic [3:0] a; logic [31:0] b; };
